title: Asset Servicing Analyst 1
description:
The Asset Servicing Analyst 1 is a trainee professional role. Requires a good knowledge of the range of processes, procedures and systems to be used in carrying out assigned tasks and a basic understanding of the underlying concepts and principles upon which the job is based. Good understanding of how the team interacts with others in accomplishing the objectives of the area. Makes evaluative judgements based on the analysis of factual information. They are expected to resolve problems by identifying and selecting solutions through the application of acquired technical experience and will be guided by precedents. Must be able to exchange information in a concise and logical way as well as be sensitive to audience diversity. Limited but direct impact on the business through the quality of the tasks/services provided. Impact of the job holder is restricted to own job.

Responsibilities:


This role will manage reconciling and processing positions related to Corporate Action events
These activities include revisions of communications, notifications and facilitating postings for Corporate Action or Proxy events
Supports a range of products/ services and projects in accordance with established systems and procedures, under general supervision
Responsible for routine operational tasks focused on administering defined procedures, analyses and report preparation, and resolving problems that require investigation or research
Performs multiple transactions of moderate complexity
Applies analytical thinking and knowledge of data analysis tools and methodologies to identify process improvements and support the implementation of projects
Interprets data and contributes to recommendations for process improvement, and/or the launch of new products/ services and upgraded platforms
Minimizes risk to the bank through knowledge of procedural requirements - understands and monitors errors to suggest solutions to reduce errors, and to adhere to audit and control policies
Identifies policy gaps and makes suggestions to support the streamlining of related work processes
Timely escalation of all requests / inquiries / issues / errors
Develops a good understanding of products and processes, and industry practices and standards
Applies a good knowledge of a wide range of specialized administrative/technical skills to monitor, analyze and/or evaluate processes and data; most of the impact is related to the accuracy of tasks performed, and the quality and timeliness of tasks that affect own team and closely related teams
Applies a good understanding of how the team and area integrate with others in accomplishing the objectives of the wider team/working group
Utilizes good communication and interpersonal skills to interact with colleagues and stakeholders, and to exchange potentially complex/sensitive information
May perform other duties as assigned by supervisor
Appropriately assess risk when business decisions are made, demonstrating particular consideration for the firm's reputation and safeguarding Citigroup, its clients and assets, by driving compliance with applicable laws, rules and regulations, adhering to Policy, applying sound ethical judgment regarding personal behavior, conduct and business practices, and escalating, managing and reporting control issues with transparency.


Qualifications:


Bachelor's degree preferred
2+ Years Related Experience
Individuals at this level exhibit basic executional capabilities and are beginning to take on more responsibility
Knowledge of multiple types of investment instruments including: Equity securities, Fixed Income and Asset Backed securities
Proficient in MS Office (Excel, Word, Access- is desired)
Proven success as a team player


Education:


Bachelor’s/University degree or equivalent experience


------------------------------------------------------

Job Family Group:

Operations - Transaction Services

------------------------------------------------------

Job Family:

Asset Servicing

------------------------------------------------------

Time Type:

Full time

------------------------------------------------------

Most Relevant Skills

Please see the requirements listed above.

------------------------------------------------------

Other Relevant Skills

For complementary skills, please see above and/or contact the recruiter.

------------------------------------------------------

Citi is an equal opportunity employer, and qualified candidates will receive consideration without regard to their race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, status as a protected veteran, or any other characteristic protected by law.

If you are a person with a disability and need a reasonable accommodation to use our search tools and/or apply for a career opportunity review Accessibility at Citi.

title: Intern- Content Writer
description:
About Amber (amberstudent.com)

Long-term accommodation booking platform for students (think booking.com for student housing). Amber helps 80M+ students worldwide, find and book full-time accommodations near their universities, without the hassle of negotiation, non-standardized and cumbersome paperwork, and broken payment process. We are the largest and fastest-growing student housing platform globally, with 1M+ units listed in 6 countries and across 100+ cities, and backed by $21 million in institutional funding led by Gaja Capital. We are growing rapidly and targeting $1B in annual gross bookings value by 2025.

If you are passionate about making international mobility and living, seamless and accessible, then - Join us in building the future of student housing!

(We are amongst the fastest growing companies in Asia Pacific as per Financial times https://www.ft.com/high-growth-asia-pacific-ranking-2022)

About the Internship:

We’re looking for a curious, creative, and driven SEO Content Writing Apprentice to join our content marketing team. This internship is perfect for someone who loves writing, is eager to learn how SEO works, and wants hands-on experience in creating content that ranks, engages, and converts.

Location - Work from Office- Pune

Duration- 6 months

Key Responsibilities:

Conduct in-depth keyword research and competitor analysis to inform content strategy.
Write high-quality, engaging, and original content for blogs, landing pages, product pages, and other web assets.
Optimize content for on-page SEO (meta tags, headers, internal linking, etc.).
Update and refresh existing content to improve performance and relevancy.
Stay updated with the latest SEO and content trends, Google algorithm updates, and industry news.

What We’re Looking For:

Strong written English and a flair for storytelling or informative writing.
Interest in SEO, digital marketing, and how search engines work.
A proactive attitude, willingness to learn, and openness to feedback.
Familiarity with blogs, newsletters, or writing platforms (your personal blog or writing portfolio is a plus!).
Basic knowledge of SEO tools (like Keyword Planner, SEMrush, or Ahrefs) is a bonus—not mandatory.

What You’ll Gain:

Real world experience working on content that reaches a global audience
Exposure to SEO strategy, keyword planning, and on-page optimization
Mentorship and feedback from experienced content and SEO professionals
Certificate of Internship + Letter of Recommendation based on performance
Potential for full-time opportunity based on performance and openings

title: Trainee - Design (BU-LED)
description:
Creating Passion: Your Responsibilities

Roles & Responsibilities
Hardware Engineering : Support schematic creation, circuit diagrams, testing, and BOM preparation.
Perform basic circuit simulations (PSPICE, LTspice).
Apply foundational knowledge of electronics, embedded systems, and assembly programming.

ECAD Library Management : Create/verify schematic symbols and footprints as per IPC standards.
Validate components with datasheets and maintain ECAD library documentation.

Component Engineering : Review datasheets and assist in part selection based on specs, cost, and compliance.
Update AVL, BOM, and identify alternates; monitor obsolescence and propose replacements.

PCB Design : Support component placement and routing as per design rules.
Generate Gerber/ODB++, drawings, pick‑and‑place, and related outputs.
Participate in reviews, run DRC checks, and resolve issues.

Contributing your strengths: your qualifications

Qualification and Education Requirements:

Bachelor’s degree in engineering (Electronics/Electronics and Telecommunication)


Experience:

Internship Experience /Industry exposure of 3-6 months
Should have basic skills in PCB design (e.g.,Ki-Cad, Altium, Eagle)
Work on projects involving Arduino and Raspberry Pi platforms for embedded system applications.


Preferred Skills / Special Skills:

Strong problem-solving and analytical skills.
Excellent communication and collaboration abilities.
Proven ability to work independently and as part of a globally distributed team.
Familiarity with tools such as oscilloscopes, multimeter, and soldering-desoldering equipment.
Inquisitive learner, Positive Attitude & Effective Communicator



Have we awoken your interest? Then we look forward to receiving your online application. If you have any questions, please contact Komal Samdade.
One Passion. Many Opportunities.

The Company
Liebherr CMCtec India Private Limited in Pune (India) was established in 2008 and started its manufacturing plant in its own facility on Pune Solapur Highway in 2012. The company is responsible for the production of tower cranes and drives.

Location
Liebherr CMCtec India Private Limited
Sai Radhe, 6th Floor, Behind Hotel Sheraton Grand, Raja Bahadur Mill Road, Pune, 411001
Pune
India (IN)

title: Business Development Intern
description:
Role Description:

We are looking for a motivated and enthusiastic Sales & Business Development Intern to join our team. The ideal candidate should have a keen interest in sales and digital marketing, along with strong communication skills and a willingness to learn in a fast-paced agency environment. This role may require occasional travel for client meetings and fieldwork.




Key Responsibilities:

Assist in identifying and reaching out to potential clients
Support the sales team in lead generation, follow-ups, and client communication
Conduct market research to identify new business opportunities
Help in preparing proposals, presentations, and reports
Coordinate with internal teams to ensure timely delivery and client satisfaction.

Qualifications & Skills:

Bachelor’s degree (pursuing or recently completed) in Business, Marketing, or related field.
Strong interest in sales, marketing, and business development.
Basic understanding of digital marketing concepts (preferred but not mandatory).
Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English and Hindi.
Good organizational skills and attention to detail.
Proactive, eager to learn, and comfortable working both independently and in a team.

Benefits:

Hands-on experience in client acquisition and sales strategy.
Exposure to digital marketing industry practices.
Guidance and mentorship from experienced professionals.
Certificate of internship and performance-based incentives.
Opportunity for full-time employment upon successful completion.

title: EIC Apprentice
description:
Job Title

EIC Apprentice

Job Description Summary

Job Description Summary

Job Description Summary

The Apprenticeship Program is a 6 month to 1 year Program that trains you for your future. The Valuation & Advisory Apprentices shall largely be involved in execution of valuation assignments and coordination with internal/external stakeholders and ensuring timely and quality deliverables.

Job Description

About the Role:


To conduct the primary field survey and interaction with local brokers etc. and to prepare databases of various real estate asset classes.
The candidate will be given research topics. Some of them would be- Luxury real estate overview in India. Major demand drivers, reasons for shift in preferences, profitability and performance of major projects across the country.
List of major real estate-based AIFs (Category-II) in India, their performance, market size and its contribution to real estate growth in India.
Consumption story of India and its impact on different real estate asset classes
India Future: Manufacturing Vs. Services Sector or Both
Know-how of how a warehouse system works and an overview of warehouse asset class PAN India
Mega Infrastructure projects being planned across India and its impact on real estate
Senior Living overview PAN India
Retail Industry trends and research paper on existing and upcoming retail mall supply.
Maintain database of projects, developers, investors etc


What do we need from you?


Under-Graduate in Finance / any other engineering discipline may also apply.
Under-Graduate - Marketing / Data Management / Finance may also apply
Good written and verbal communication skills
Intermediate to advanced excel skills is essential.
High attention to detail and the ability to operate in a fast-paced environment.


Why join Cushman & Wakefield?

As one of the leading global real estate services firms transforming the way people work, shop and live working at Cushman & Wakefield means you will benefit from;


Being part of a growing global company;
Career development and a promote from within culture;
An organisation committed to Diversity and Inclusion


We're committed to providing work-life balance for our people in an inclusive, rewarding environment.

We achieve this by providing a flexible and agile work environment by focusing on technology and autonomy to help our people achieve their career ambitions. We focus on career progression and foster a promotion from within culture, leveraging global opportunities to ensure we retain our top talent. We encourage continuous learning and development opportunities to develop personal, professional and technical capabilities, and we reward with a comprehensive employee benefits program.

We have a vision of the future, where people simply belong.

That's why we support and celebrate inclusive causes, not just on days of recognition throughout the year, but every day. We embrace diversity across race, colour, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity or persons with disabilities or protected veteran status.

We ensure DEI is part of our DNA as a global community - it means we go way beyond than just talking about it - we live it. If you want to live it too, join us.

INCO: “Cushman & Wakefield”

title: Sales Intern
description:
WHO ARE WE?

Kasplo is a cloud-based email delivery and management platform that helps businesses sendtransactional and marketing emails at scale. Our platform allows users to create and send emails, manage lists and contacts, and track performance with detailed analytics.Seamlessly integrating with e-commerce platforms, CRMs, and analytics tools, Kasplo ensures high email deliverability with advanced authentication and optimization features. Known for its intuitive interface, affordability, and extensive features, Kasplo empowers businesses of all sizes with excellent customer support and advanced tools for retention marketing.

Conduct research to identify potential leads and ICPs

title: Motion Graphics Design(AI) Intern
description:
Job Title: Motion Graphic Design(AI) Intern

Internship Type: Full-Time Internship (6 Months)

Work Mode: Remote

About The Job

Quantum IT Innovation is a globally recognized mobile & web app development and digital marketing agency. It is a USA-based incorporation with offices in the US and the UK and a delivery center in India, with a team of 100+ professionals. We provide end-to-end web development and digital marketing solutions to global B2B and B2C clients.

Role Overview

We are seeking a creative and detail-oriented AI Motion Graphic Design Intern who is passionate about motion graphics, AI video creation, and visual storytelling. This role offers hands-on exposure to real client projects, where you will create engaging motion graphics and AI-driven video content for digital platforms.

Key Responsibilities


Create engaging AI motion graphics for various video and marketing projects
Develop design concepts, storyboards, and layouts for motion graphics
Produce AI motion graphic videos for web, social media, and mobile platforms
Edit raw footage and enhance videos with animations, effects, and audio
Select appropriate colors, visuals, transitions, and animations to improve design quality
Work closely with the creative and marketing teams to deliver high-quality outputs
Explore and implement the latest AI design tools, techniques, and trends
Ensure all motion graphics are visually appealing and aligned with brand guidelines


Skills Required


Adobe After Effects
Adobe Premiere Pro
Adobe Animate
Adobe Illustrator
Adobe Photoshop
Animation and Motion Graphics
Video Editing & Video Making


Other Requirements


Preferred 2023, 2024, or 2025 passed-out candidates
Hands-on experience with AI tools for video and graphic creation
Experience in CGI videos and AI-generated content is preferred
Basic understanding of 2D and 3D motion graphics
Working knowledge of Maya or similar 3D tools will be an added advantage
Strong creativity, attention to detail, and ability to meet deadlines


Perks & Benefits


Paid internship with hands-on project exposure
Remote work flexibility
Supportive and learning-focused work environment
Opportunity to work on international client projects and real-time campaigns
Performance-based growth opportunities within the organization


Note: This is a paid internship.Skills: ai,motion,blender,adobe premiere pro,motion graphics,python scripting,adobe illustrator

title: Trainee Engineer
description:
Make your ability count at NNE

We are experts in end-to-end pharma engineering, and our success is built on our relationships, both with our colleagues and our customers. If you want to learn, adapt and get trained to work on projects shaping the future of sustainable and intelligent pharma facilities, NNE is the place to be. This training program is a six-month course, and we are offering this Apprenticeship Program for engineering graduates who are passionate about pharma engineering.

Why should you join us?

As a trainee engineer, you will embark on a comprehensive training program designed to equip you with the technical skills and industry knowledge essential for a successful career in pharmaceutical engineering. You will get better understanding about pharmaceutical manufacturing and compliance processes. You will also get to know about project execution.

Location: Bangalore, India

Experience: 0-6 Months

Department: Pharma Engineering Talent Development

Duration: 6 months

How you might spend your days (Main Roles & Responsibilities)

As a trainee engineer in a pharmaceutical engineering consulting company, your days will be structured to provide you with a balanced mix of learning, hands-on experience, and professional development.:


Participate in training sessions on various technical aspects of pharmaceutical engineering.
Be a part of an engaging learning environment, where you learn new ways of designing.
Meeting your mentor/manager to discuss your progress, challenges, and learning experiences.
Executing pilot projects in their respective areas



Who You Are (Preferred Competencies)

We care about who you are as a person. As an apprentice you are expected to:


Understand your colleagues and respect their varied cultural backgrounds
Be a good listener and a creative thinker
Stay curious
Be proactive in creating an atmosphere of trust with colleagues
Eager to learn and thrive in a dynamic work environment with highly skilled colleagues
Excited to build on the NNE culture of innovation
Implement the learning effectively in pilot project



The miles you’ve walked (Education)

Below are these qualifications needed for you to do well in this role:


You have a degree in engineering (graduate / postgraduates) within



Biotechnology or pharmaceutical

Chemical

Mechanical / Mechatronics

Electrical / Electronics / Instrumentation

Computer science

Robotics & automation


You are fresher or having maximum up to six months of experiences
You speak and write English



We’re experts bound by a noble cause and driven by passion

NNE is short for Novo Nordisk Engineering. And for all of us who work here, NNE means so much more. Some of us are driven by working on highly complex projects together with other leading experts. Others are inspired by a work environment with flat hierarchy and flexible conditions. And some love the fact that they work for a world leading engineering consultancy within the pharma industry. If there's one thing, we all share, it's the passion for what we do. Together we design and build pharma facilities that are essential for millions of patients all over the world.

Sounds like something you’d like to do? If you’re ready to join our passion, let’s hear from you.

Questions before applying? Please contact: hqer@nne.com

Please note we only accept applications submitted through our online recruitment system.

You do not need to attach a cover letter to your application, but please include a few sentences about why you are applying in your resume or CV.

To facilitate an efficient and fair recruitment process, we encourage you to refrain from adding a photo in your CV. At NNE, we commit to an inclusive recruitment process and equality of opportunity for all our applicants.

The invites for interviews will be on a recurring basis.

To learn more about us visit www.nne.com

title: Junior Software Developer Intern
description:
Junior Software Developer Intern (Remote) – Skillzenloop




Location: Remote

Type: Full-Time Internship

Stipend: ₹17,000/month

Duration: 1–3 Months




Skillzenloop is hiring a Software Developer Intern to work on real-world applications and contribute to building scalable and efficient software solutions. This role is ideal for students and freshers who want hands-on experience in software development, coding practices, and system design in a practical environment.




Key Responsibilities

• Write clean, efficient, and maintainable code in relevant programming languages

• Assist in developing, testing, and deploying software applications

• Debug and resolve issues in existing codebases

• Collaborate with team members to understand requirements and implement features

• Work on backend logic, APIs, or frontend components based on project needs

• Participate in code reviews and follow best coding practices

• Optimize application performance and scalability

• Maintain proper documentation for developed features and systems




Required Skills

• Basic knowledge of at least one programming language (Python, Java, JavaScript, or C++)

• Understanding of programming fundamentals (OOP, data structures, algorithms)

• Familiarity with web development or software development concepts

• Basic knowledge of databases and APIs is a plus

• Understanding of Git/GitHub is preferred

• Strong problem-solving and logical thinking ability

• Good communication skills and attention to detail

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment




Eligibility Criteria

• Students or recent graduates from Computer Science, IT, or related fields

• Freshers with basic programming knowledge are encouraged to apply

• Candidates with academic or personal projects will have an advantage

• Must be available for a full-time remote internship




Perks and Benefits

• Monthly stipend of ₹17,000

• Hands-on experience with real-world software development projects

• Internship completion certificate

• Opportunity to build a strong development portfolio

• Exposure to industry-standard tools and workflows

• Learning-focused and growth-oriented environment




This internship is a strong opportunity for individuals looking to start their career in software development and gain practical experience in building real-world applications.

title: Intern, Investigations Diligence and Compliance
description:
We are looking for detail‑oriented, analytical and proactive interns to support our Investigations, Diligence & Compliance (IDC) team. This internship is ideal for students or recent graduates who want hands‑on experience in research, data analysis, due diligence, online database work, and structured report writing.

You will collaborate with experienced analysts and consultants to support a variety of diligence and compliance‑related projects across sectors and geographies.

Key Responsibilities


Research & Data Gathering
Conduct open‑source research (OSINT) using public records, corporate filings, online media, and global data sources.
Use online databases and information platforms to gather company and individual background information.
Summarize findings and identify relevant insights for diligence work.
Data Analysis
Review and analyse financial, operational, corporate and regulatory information.
Identify patterns, trends, discrepancies, or red flags based on data collected.
Work with datasets, spreadsheets and analytical tools to extract insights for reports.
Documentation Review
Review publicly available records, corporate documents, disclosures and filings.
Cross‑verify information from multiple sources to ensure accuracy.
Maintain organized and traceable documentation for each assignment.
Report Writing
Prepare structured, concise and well‑written diligence reports and research summaries.
Present key observations clearly, with supporting evidence wherever necessary.
Assist in preparing internal briefs, presentations and project notes.


Who We Are Looking For

Academic Background (Any of the following):


Finance, Commerce, Economics
Analytics, Statistics, Data Science
Law / Legal Studies
Business Administration or similar disciplines


Essential Skills & Qualities


Strong analytical thinking, problem‑solving ability and attention to detail.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
Ability to conduct structured research and synthesize large volumes of information.
High level of integrity, discretion and professionalism.
Comfortable working with data, spreadsheets and online information sources.
Ability to work in a fast‑paced environment, both independently and collaboratively.


What You Will Gain


Exposure to real‑world assignments in diligence, compliance and business intelligence.
Experience working with industry‑leading databases and research tools.
Skills in data analysis, OSINT research, information validation, and professional report writing.
Mentorship and learning opportunities with experienced IDC professionals.


About Kroll

Join the global leader in risk and financial advisory solutions—Kroll. With a nearly century-long legacy, we blend trusted expertise with cutting-edge technology to navigate and redefine industry complexities. As a part of One Team, One Kroll, you'll contribute to a collaborative and empowering environment, propelling your career to new heights. Ready to build, protect, restore and maximize our clients’ value? Your journey begins with Kroll.

Kroll is committed to equal opportunity and diversity, and recruits people based on merit.

In order to be considered for a position, you must formally apply via careers.kroll.com.


Show more

title: Human Resources Intern
description:
We are seeking a fresh graduate or currently pursuing a Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Human Resources or a related field and passionate about making a career in human resources.




Job Title: HR Intern

Duration: 3 Months

Requirement: Immediate

Location: Fort, Mumbai




Key Responsibilities

1. Employee Engagement & Experience

Assist in planning, coordinating, and executing on-site and off-site employee engagement activities and events.

2. HR Management System (HRMS) Support

Support the HR team in the day-to-day HRMS operations, including data entry and maintaining accurate records.

3. Recruitment Operations & Coordination

Schedule and coordinate interviews between candidates and business heads.
Communicate post-interview feedback to candidates in a timely manner.
Initiate and manage online interview calls.
Assist in talent acquisition by drafting job descriptions and posting openings on platforms such as LinkedIn, career pages, and other job portals.
Connect with college placement cells to source interns and full-time candidates.
Coordinate with internal stakeholders to identify suitable candidates for various roles.
Conduct reference checks for selected candidates.

4. HR Documentation & Compliance

Assist in preparing HR documents such as relieving letters, experience letters, confirmation letters, and transfer letters.
Coordinate with different business units to support HR compliance processes, including sharing new joiner and exit employee data for PF addition/deletion with the Finance team.

5. HR Data Management & Reporting

Maintain and regularly update HR records for PAN-India employees (new joiners and exits).
Support the analysis and reporting of key HR metrics, including:
Employee demographics
Attrition and retention analysis
Gender ratio
